description.from:
Deals 200*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+ATK126% Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for 1 sec. Then enters [God's Proxy] state for 10 sec, empowering skills.

[God's Proxy]: ATK increases by 264*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Normal Attack DMG increases by 100%. This effect cannot be dispelled.
description.to:
Deals 200*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+126% ATK Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for 1 sec, then enters [God's Proxy] state for 10 sec, enhancing skills.

[God's Proxy]: ATK increases by 314*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), and Normal Attack DMG increases by 100%. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.from:
ATK increases by 135*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), and Magic Evasion increases by 360.

When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 20%, and damage taken from non-hero enemies is reduced by 20%.
description.to:
ATK increases by 192*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), and Magic Evasion increases by 240.

When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 20%, and damage taken from non-hero enemies is reduced by 20%.

light.from: Physical Evasion increases by 600 for the duration..
light.to: Physical Evasion increases by 140 for the duration.

description.from: [Valiant Dash] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Cooldown by 10% upon a Crit Hit.
description.to: [Valiant Dash] Stuns the target for 1.5 sec, and reduces Cooldown by {0}% upon a Critical Hit.

description.from: [Proxy of God] increases Dodge Chance by an additional 250 and ATK Spd by an additional {0} for the duration of the Skill.
description.to: [Proxy of God] increases Dodge Chance by an additional 400 and ATK Spd by an additional {0} for the duration of the Skill.

description.from: [Goddess Strike] Increases DEF Boost by 50%, and own DMG dealt to bosses by {0}%.
description.to: [Goddess Strike] Increases Magic Evasion by 360 and increases DMG dealt to heroes by {0}%.
